description_long: This hamburger features a soft, rounded bun with a smooth, light brown surface, enclosing two thick, grilled beef patties. Each patty is separated by a slice of melted yellow cheese, which slightly oozes over the edges, creating a visually appealing layered effect. The patties have a textured, charred appearance, suggesting they are well-cooked and juicy. The bun appears pillowy and slightly glossy, with no visible seeds or toppings on its surface. The hamburger is presented on a simple, round, gray plate, emphasizing its central placement. No additional toppings such as lettuce, tomato, or onions are visible, giving it a classic double cheeseburger look.
description: A double cheeseburger with a smooth, plain bun, two grilled beef patties, and melted cheese, served on a gray plate. The burger is visually simple and classic, with no extra toppings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the layered structure of the bun, two beef patties, and cheese, with the cheese slightly more visible on the right side.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the cheese between the patties and a clearer look at the patty texture.
description_view_2: Direct rear view with the bun and patties aligned, showing the even stacking of ingredients and minimal cheese overhang.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the cheese slice protruding on the right and the uniform thickness of the patties.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Cheese slices are layered between two beef patties, with no visible lettuce, tomato, onions, or pickles. The arrangement is simple and classic, focusing on the meat and cheese.
